title: Generation Request Meta Data Task Type 2x2
sourceTitle: Generation Request Meta Data Task Type 2x2
prompt:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "2x2_pink_balletcore_pilates_evening_flash_editorial_grid",
      "language": "en",
      "style": "ultra-photorealistic luxury balletcore pilates wellness campaign with evening flash editorial photography",
      "version": "v2.0_PINK_BALLETCORE_FLASH_BALLOON_ACCESSORY_GRID"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "high",
      "identity_lock": "preserve the same woman if a face reference is provided, keep her facial proportions, skin tone, lips, eyes, jawline, hair and natural beauty consistent across all panels — same identity in every panel",
      "pose_reference": "use uploaded images only as inspiration for elegant barre stretching, kneeling pilates poses, mirror selfie framing, wellness lifestyle, ballet shoes, soft accessories and dreamy pink ballet studio energy"
    },
    "output": {
      "format": "2x2 Instagram-style editorial photo grid collage",
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5 vertical",
      "layout": "four equal rectangular panels with very thin clean warm-cream gutters, polished premium editorial grid",
      "quality": "ultra high resolution, realistic skin texture, sharp facial details, natural anatomy, luxury campaign finish"
    },
    "art_direction": {
      "concept": "A premium pink balletcore pilates and wellness campaign shot like an evening flash fashion editorial: elegant athletic woman in a luxury ballet-pilates studio, soft ballet-pink activewear, ballet shoes, delicate feminine accessories, pink graphic eyeliner makeup, tiny pink balloon styling detail, healthy lifestyle props, refined confidence and expensive dreamy balletcore aesthetic.",
      "mood": "feminine, refined, ethereal, expensive, dreamy, slightly cinematic, evening ballet studio atmosphere with soft flash highlights",
      "color_palette": [
        "soft ballet pink",
        "dusty rose",
        "powder pink",
        "warm ivory",
        "cream",
        "champagne gold",
        "pearl white",
        "soft peach blush",
        "light wood",
        "subtle silver flash reflections"
      ],
      "lighting": "evening editorial flash photography mixed with soft ambient studio glow: gentle direct flash catchlights on skin, creamy highlights, soft realistic shadows, subtle flash reflection on mirrors and ballet shoes, warm pink ambient bounce, NOT harsh nightclub flash, NOT blown-out skin"
    },
    "subject": {
      "description": "young adult athletic woman with elegant feminine features, glowing realistic skin, toned natural ballet/pilates body with long lean lines, soft confident expression, refined dancer posture",
      "ethnicity_features": "warm Mediterranean/Anatolian features, naturally beautiful with preserved real-human asymmetry, late 20s, almond-shaped dark eyes, soft warm olive skin tone, natural full brows, soft cupid's bow lips, soft jawline NOT sharp contoured",
      "hair": "sleek dark classic ballet bun at crown or low chignon at nape, softly slicked back with a few natural face-framing strands, polished but still realistic with tiny flyaways",
      "makeup": "evening balletcore glam with realistic dewy skin, soft peachy-pink blush high on cheekbones, glossy nude-pink lip, brushed-up brows, lifted natural lashes, and delicate pink graphic eyeliner: thin pastel pink winged liner with a tiny painted ribbon, heart or star accent near the outer corner, artistic but elegant, not costume makeup",
      "outfit": "soft ballet pink short-sleeve pilates bodysuit with sculpted body-contouring fit, square neckline or soft scoop neckline, matching ballet pink high-waisted biker shorts, cream or pale pink ballet leg warmers",
      "footwear": "soft blush-pink satin ballet flats or ballet-inspired training shoes with delicate ribbon ties around the ankles, realistic satin texture, slight worn-in sole detail, elegant pointed dancer foot shape",
      "accessories": "small gold hoop earrings, single pearl bracelet, thin champagne-gold ring, glossy pale-pink natural nails, silk pink hair ribbon detail, soft pink matte water bottle, blush pink pilates mat, and one tiny pale-pink balloon used as a delicate editorial prop in one or two panels"
    },
    "panels": {
      "panel_1_top_left": {
        "scene": "luxury ballet barre studio at evening with soft cream walls, polished wooden ballet barre, mirror reflection, subtle flash highlight, warm ivory floor and minimal architectural detail",
        "pose": "side-profile elegant ballet stretch with one leg extended gracefully on the wooden barre, torso upright and lifted, dancer posture, one hand resting softly on barre while the other holds a tiny pale-pink balloon by a thin ribbon near her side",
        "camera": "85mm portrait lens, slightly low side angle, editorial flash catchlight, sharp face and body, soft background blur",
        "details": "ballet shoes clearly visible with satin ribbon ties, realistic fabric tension on bodysuit, correct ballet leg anatomy with pointed foot, natural elegant hand placement, pink graphic eyeliner visible but subtle, premium ballet editorial mood"
      },
      "panel_2_top_right": {
        "scene": "bright evening pilates studio with full-length mirrors, light wood floor, soft cream curtains, pink mats blurred in background, delicate flash reflection in mirror",
        "pose": "kneeling gracefully on a soft pink pilates mat, hands posed gently near face or under chin in delicate balletcore framing, shoulders relaxed, soft natural smile toward camera",
        "camera": "35mm lifestyle lens, front three-quarter angle, candid luxury editorial feel with gentle flash",
        "details": "pearl bracelet visible, pale-pink ballet shoes placed neatly beside mat, soft pink water bottle nearby, tiny pink balloon floating low in background, pink eyeliner detail visible, realistic mirror reflections"
      },
      "panel_3_bottom_left": {
        "scene": "minimal luxury apartment kitchen or studio lounge corner at evening, white marble counter, soft flash reflection, warm wood accents, refined wellness aesthetic",
        "pose": "mirror selfie style, phone in one hand partially covering face naturally, holding a large glossy blush-pink ceramic bowl with healthy lunch in the other hand",
        "food_details": "bowl filled with jasmine rice, sliced avocado, sautéed mushrooms, steamed broccoli, grilled protein, fresh lemon slice, and pomegranate seeds for pink accent",
        "camera": "smartphone mirror selfie realism with editorial flash, natural perspective, sharp hands and bowl detail",
        "details": "ballet-pink activewear matching the bowl palette, pale-pink natural nails, gold bracelet visible, ballet flats and leg warmers visible at bottom of mirror, tiny pink balloon tied to chair or counter edge, NO distorted hands, NO warped fingers"
      },
      "panel_4_bottom_right": {
        "scene": "sunlit-meets-evening ballet-pilates studio with tall black-framed windows, full mirror wall, warm floor reflections, dreamy diffused ambient light plus soft direct flash",
        "pose": "standing elegant ballet quad stretch near the barre, one hand softly holding ankle or pink leg warmer, body angled in dancer three-quarter, looking over shoulder with refined confident expression",
        "camera": "50mm editorial lens, full-body vertical framing, cinematic depth of field, visible flash catchlights",
        "details": "ballet shoes with satin ankle ribbons, realistic fabric stretch, natural shine on bun, accurate mirror reflection without distortion, tiny pale-pink balloon softly blurred near the floor, pink graphic eyeliner and dewy evening makeup visible"
      }
    },
    "realism_rules": {
      "face": "every visible face must be sharp, realistic, naturally detailed and identity-consistent across all four panels — same woman every frame",
      "body": "athletic ballet-trained natural proportions, correct anatomy, realistic shoulders, arms, legs, knees, feet and hands, elegant dancer line without impossible flexibility",
      "skin": "real pore texture visible, soft flash highlights, subtle preserved imperfections, NO plastic smoothing, NO airbrushed doll skin",
      "clothing": "real fabric seams, natural stretch, compression marks where body bends, realistic wrinkles and natural fit",
      "footwear": "ballet shoes must look physically real, correctly tied, correctly shaped around the feet, no warped ribbons",
      "lighting": "evening editorial flash must look tasteful and expensive, with realistic shadows and mirror reflections, never harsh or overexposed",
      "composition": "premium 2x2 grid, polished editorial but realistic, luxury balletcore wellness photo-diary aesthetic"
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "red outfit",
      "crimson",
      "neon pink",
      "hot pink",
      "magenta",
      "fuchsia",
      "barbie pink",
      "cheap plastic balloon",
      "oversized balloon",
      "party decoration look",
      "different woman in each panel",
      "identity drift",
      "inconsistent face",
      "blurred face",
      "plastic skin",
      "AI doll face",
      "over-smoothed skin",
      "bad anatomy",
      "extra fingers",
      "warped hands",
      "broken wrists",
      "distorted ballet feet",
      "incorrect pointe shoes",
      "warped ribbons",
      "unrealistic flexibility",
      "fake mirror reflection",
      "messy background",
      "low resolution",
      "cartoon",
      "anime",
      "3D render",
      "overly sexualized pose",
      "visible logos",
      "Nike swoosh",
      "Adidas stripes",
      "watermark",
      "fake phone interface",
      "text errors",
      "glitchy text",
      "blown-out flash",
      "oily skin",
      "ring light glow",
      "oversaturated colors"
    ]
  }
}
